title: Racosperma xerophilum
taxonomy: Racosperma xerophilum is classified within the family Fabaceae. This classification places it among the legume family, a group of flowering plants that are commonly known for their seeds in pods. Within the Fabaceae family, Racosperma xerophilum is further classified as a genus of flowering plants native to Australia. The genus Racosperma is often classified as a synonym of the genus Acacia, which suggests a close relationship between these two genera.
